fe_choices_learner_satisfaction.note: The Department for Education does not intend to run the FE Choices learner satisfaction survey again in its current form. The most recent survey data available is from 2018-2019. The 2019-2020 and 2020-2021 surveys were cancelled due to COVID-19.

national_achievement_rate_tables.latest_data: 2024-25 academic year (based on fourteenth ILR data return)
national_achievement_rate_tables.note: Institution-specific achievement rate data requires direct access to the DfE Explore Education Statistics portal. The ILR is an administrative data collection system used to fund training providers.

kirklees_college_results.note: Kirklees College publishes annual results on their website. For 2025 results, check the source URL directly.

recommendations_for_demo: Use Ofsted judgments as primary quality indicator (available for all institutions)
RateMyApprenticeship scores provide good quantitative comparison for apprenticeship provision
FE Choices data is discontinued - suggest using Ofsted + RateMyApprenticeship + review platforms instead
National achievement rate tables from DfE can be downloaded as CSV for institution-level comparison
